name: the tool-option-surfaces catalog declares the per-rule option surface for every tool in the toolchain
command: ruby -ryaml -rjson -rset -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"].keys.to_set; m=JSON.parse(File.read(ARGV[1]))["tools"].map{|t| t["tool"]}.to_set; miss=(m-c); STDERR.puts("missing=#{miss.to_a.inspect} catalog=#{c.size} toolchain=#{m.size}"); exit(miss.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/runners/toolchain.json" && echo catalog-covers-every-tool 1>&2
